Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.
Vaal Domination | Description | Vaal Domination is a Minion Vaal spell that causes one of your Sentinels of Dominance to ascend into a giant Templar statue, causing it to gain new attacks, overrides its duration, and improves its damage and damage reduction. Monster modifiers from Magic or Rare Sentinels are kept. Using this skill while you have the maximum number of Ascended Sentinels currently active will refresh an existing one's duration.
Vaal Domination | Skill functions and interactions | Ascended Sentinels do not count towards your regular Sentinel of Dominance limit and instead has a unique limit of 3, and innately deals 200% more Damage and takes 70% less Damage. Any buffs and debuffs on your Sentinel before it is Ascended is retained when transformed. The chosen Sentinel's minion duration is reset when ascending, and recasting this spell may refresh its duration if chosen.
Vaal Domination | Skill functions and interactions | Gem levels : Unlike its base skill Dominating Blow , Vaal Domination is a spell, not an attack. As tags for Vaal skills also apply to their base skills in terms of additional gem levels, using the Vaal version of the gem enables a player to scale the base skill with +# to Level of all Spell Skill Gems on daggers , sceptres or staves as well as +1 to Level of all Vaal Skill Gems found on Sacrificial Garb. This combination allows up to 3 additional gem levels. With the difference in skill category between the base version and Vaal Domination, there is built in synergies with Instruments of Virtue , Instruments of Zeal , and Bastion of Hope.
Vaal Domination | Skill functions and interactions | Being a spell unlike Dominating Blow , Vaal Domination can be actively used with a non-melee weapon (e.g. wand or bow ). Sentinels of Dominance can persist even when weapon swapping to a non-melee weapon, and will retain their Ascended status; it is possible to permanently maintain Sentinels of Dominance with a non-melee weapon through repeated use of Vaal Domination.
Vaal Domination | Skill functions and interactions | Vaal Domination can only be cast on Sentinels of Dominance created from the base skill granted by that specific gem. [1]
Vaal Domination | Skill functions and interactions | Though not reflected on the in-game tooltip, The Dark Monarch doubles the Ascended Sentinel limit. However, attempting to use the skill again will simply summon three new Sentinels, incurring Soul Gain Prevention and forfeiting the ability to refresh existing Sentinels before their duration expires. This can be circumvented with Atziri's Reign , sources of #% reduced Soul Gain Prevention Duration , or legacy gear.
Vaal Domination | Gem level progression | The Vaal skill portion of this gem does not scale with levels.
Vaal Domination | Gem quality | The Vaal skill portion of this gem does not scale with quality.
Vaal Domination | Item acquisition | Vaal Domination has restrictions on where or how it can drop. Vaal Domination can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas , or by corrupting Dominating Blow.

Vaal Domination | Related helmet enchantments | Note that helmet enchantments are no longer obtainable since version 3.23.0 and can only be obtained in permanent leagues as already enchanted items from before this patch.

Vaal Double Strike | Description | Vaal Double Strike is a Vaal melee skill that performs two fast attacks and summons two doubles of the character to attack monsters for a duration.
Vaal Double Strike | Skill function and interactions | Using this skill spawns two immortal untargetable clones. The clones are proxies that use Vaal Double Strike, with the player's offensive stats, though without spawning more clones themselves. [1]
Vaal Double Strike | Skill function and interactions | Unlike similar skills that creates clones of your character, like Mirror Arrow , the clones are not classified as minions , so they will not benefit from any effects regarding minions.
Vaal Double Strike | Skill function and interactions | The clones create a visual snapshot of the character upon usage of the skill, which includes visual effects like charges or monster modifiers stolen by Headhunter or Inspired Learning. These effects will not have any effect on the clones however - their attack has the player's stats, not their own.
Vaal Double Strike | Skill function and interactions | The clones will teleport to your location if you move too far away from them.

Vaal Flicker Strike | Description | Vaal Flicker Strike is a Vaal melee skill that repeatedly attacks nearby enemies while teleporting to them, dealing no damage but leaving a 'wound'. After completing all repeats , it deals an additional hit to each wounded enemy, inflicting the combined damage of each enemy's wounds.
Vaal Flicker Strike | Skill functions and interactions | Vaal Flicker combines damage similar to Dual Strike or Explosive Arrow 's explosion. [1] It has unique behaviour in that each wounding hit also counts as an immediate zero damage hit. These hits do not stun or apply on-hit effects that require damage, but can grant or apply other effects on hit, and will consume hits from existing impale debuffs. Each wounding hit can be blocked individually, preventing damage from that specific wound. If the final hit is blocked, damaging ailments (and other on-hit effects) are prevented, even if unblocked wounding hits did calculate non-zero ailment DPS.
Vaal Flicker Strike | Skill functions and interactions | Vaal Flicker's ability to combine damage from a large number of repeats allows it to inflict high damage in a single hit. This can be advantageous for effects like Shock or impale (optionally combined with The Impaler ). Despite its ailment damage penalty, Vaal Flicker is still capable of inflicting a single ailment with high DPS, which may be favorable for e.g. Alchemist's Mark , Flame Surge , or Low Tolerance.
Vaal Flicker Strike | Item acquisition | Vaal Flicker Strike has restrictions on where or how it can drop. Vaal Flicker Strike can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas , or by corrupting Flicker Strike.
Vaal Flicker Strike | Recipes | Vaal Flicker Strike can be created from the following recipes:

Vaal Ground Slam | Skill Functions and Interactions | Interactions :
Vaal Ground Slam | Skill Functions and Interactions | Southbound gloves have the potential to prevent your hits from killing enemies, keeping them alive on 1 life. This allows the character to wait until the soul gain prevention time is over to kill enemies and gain all souls from all kills. The base duration is 1 second and this can be reduced further by Vaal Skills have % reduced Soul Gain Prevention Duration. After the soul gain prevention timer has expired, the enemy can be killed by any non-vaal skill that can do damage over time and the character will gain all souls for all kills if they have room to store those kills. If the kill size outnumbers the souls per use in every situation, this combination can be repeated over and over again. In other words in areas where you regularly kill 15 enemies or more at the same time, vaal ground slam will always have enough souls to be used on every pack of enemies.
Vaal Ground Slam | Item acquisition | Vaal Ground Slam has restrictions on where or how it can drop. Vaal Ground Slam can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas.
Vaal Ground Slam | Recipes | Vaal Ground Slam can be created from the following recipes:
Vaal Ground Slam | Threshold jewels | The following threshold jewels augment Vaal Ground Slam:
Vaal Ground Slam | Threshold jewels | Note that the jewels may be drop disabled and can only be found in permanent leagues as legacy items.
Vaal Ground Slam | Related helmet enchantments | The following helmet enchantments affect Vaal Ground Slam.
Vaal Ground Slam | Related helmet enchantments | Note that helmet enchantments are no longer obtainable since version 3.23.0 and can only be obtained in permanent leagues as already enchanted items from before this patch.
Vaal Ground Slam | Alternate skill effects | Vaal Ground Slam has the following alternate skill effects :

Vaal Ice Shot | Description | Vaal Ice Shot is a bow Vaal attack skill that fires a regular Ice Shot arrow, and also summons Mirage Sharpshooters that use Ice Shot when you do.
Vaal Ice Shot | Skill functions and interactions | Cone explosion: On hitting a target, Ice Shot creates a cone-shaped explosion that damages enemies behind the target. A target hit by an arrow cannot also be hit by the cone from that arrow [1]. However, cones from other arrows or exploding from other targets can still hit the target. The cones can overlap. The cone effect occurs on every hit against an enemy or obstacle, regardless of projectile behaviours.
Vaal Ice Shot | Skill functions and interactions | Area of effect modifiers scale the size of the cone; however, it does not scale the angle of the cone itself.
Vaal Ice Shot | Skill functions and interactions | Modifiers to number of Projectiles do not apply to this Skill when used by Mirage Sharpshooters : Each Mirage Sharpshooter can only fire a single arrow at a time, even when supported by Barrage Support. Therefore, support gems that add projectiles are a net damage loss for Mirage Sharpshooters.
Vaal Ice Shot | Skill functions and interactions | Mirage Sharpshooters are spawned in a half circle in front of the caster with their placement unaffected by AoE modifiers, fire in a cascade rather than simultaneously, and will target the cursor position absent an actual target.
Vaal Ice Shot | Skill functions and interactions | Mirage Sharpshooters fire their Ice Shots when the player uses any non-Vaal version of Ice Shot, including transfigured versions. Additionally, it is not necessary to use the Ice Shot skill provided by this gem; a separate Ice Shot gem will also work. Mirage Sharpshooters do not fire when Ice Shot is triggered.
Vaal Ice Shot | Skill functions and interactions | Despite being proxies , Mirage Sharpshooters cannot deal damage if the player has Ancestral Bond.
Vaal Ice Shot | Item acquisition | Vaal Ice Shot has restrictions on where or how it can drop. Vaal Ice Shot can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas , or by corrupting Ice Shot.
Vaal Ice Shot | Recipes | Vaal Ice Shot can be created from the following recipes:

Vaal Ice Shot | Related helmet enchantments | Note that helmet enchantments are no longer obtainable since version 3.23.0 and can only be obtained in permanent leagues as already enchanted items from before this patch.

Vaal Lightning Arrow | Description | Vaal Lightning Arrow is a bow Vaal attack skill that fires a barrage of arrows which travel for a short time before randomly changing direction, repeating this behaviour several times. Hitting an enemy causes it to be struck with a bolt of lightning that also can hit nearby enemies.
Vaal Lightning Arrow | Skill functions and interactions | Projectile Speed: as the time the arrows can travel is fixed, modifying projectile speed affects the total coverage of these arrows, as well as the ability to hit a specific target multiple times over its uptime.
Vaal Lightning Arrow | Skill functions and interactions | Fork and chain instead cause projectiles to change directions additional times; this also increases their overall uptime.
Vaal Lightning Arrow | Skill functions and interactions | Arrows initially fire in sequence (like Barrage Support ) before they change directions. It is not possible to animation cancel while firing [1].
Vaal Lightning Arrow | Item acquisition | Vaal Lightning Arrow has restrictions on where or how it can drop. Vaal Lightning Arrow can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas , or by corrupting Lightning Arrow.

Vaal Molten Strike | Description | Vaal Molten Strike is a Vaal melee attack skill that strikes an enemy, with some of the physical damage converted to fire damage. Using this skill causes multiple molten ball projectiles that land to deal damage in a small area and bounce outward in the same direction based on the number of additional chains.
Vaal Molten Strike | Item acquisition | Vaal Molten Strike has restrictions on where or how it can drop. Vaal Molten Strike can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas , or by corrupting Molten Strike.

Acquisition Drop restricted Drop level: 12 Vaal Power Siphon can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas.
Vaal Power Siphon | Description | Vaal Power Siphon is a vaal projectile attack that fires a single wand projectile at each nearby enemy, granting a power charge for any slain by it.
Vaal Power Siphon | Skill Functions and Interactions | Vaal Power Siphon fires one projectile at each enemy, meaning that if 20 enemies are present, adding Lesser Multiple Projectiles will cause 60 total projectiles to be fired. However each set of projectiles is able only to hit the enemy it targeted, and only with a single projectile. This means that additional projectiles created by support gems such as Greater Multiple Projectiles Support and Barrage Support do not have any effect despite reducing damage, unless an original projectile did not hit an enemy entirely (e.g. by moving out of the way). Other support gems that create or modify projectiles, such as Chain Support , do result in each projectile being able to hit more than one target.
Vaal Power Siphon | Skill Functions and Interactions | In terms of the range meant by "nearby" enemies, Vaal Power Siphon will target at least all enemies onscreen. This is an AoE calculation, so projectile speed does not affect the effective range. [1]
Vaal Power Siphon | Item acquisition | Vaal Power Siphon has restrictions on where or how it can drop. Vaal Power Siphon can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas.

Vaal Righteous Fire | Description | Vaal Righteous Fire is a vaal spell that expends a percentage of your energy shield and life to burn surrounding enemies for a short period of time, relative to how much life and energy shield was spent.
Vaal Righteous Fire | Skill Functions and Interactions | On-hit effects : The damage you do to yourself when Using Vaal Righteous Fire is not considered a hit on yourself. Thus it will not proc any when-hit effects. For the same reason, it does not interrupt energy shield recharge.
Vaal Righteous Fire | Skill Functions and Interactions | Spell Totem : Vaal Righteous Fire cannot be supported by Spell Totem Support , as it is a Vaal Skill.
Vaal Righteous Fire | Skill Functions and Interactions | Duration Modifiers : Vaal Righteous fire now has the Duration tag, allowing it to be linked to and fully benefit from support gems such as Efficacy Support , More Duration Support and Less Duration Support.
Vaal Righteous Fire | Skill Functions and Interactions | Righteous Fire : The buffs and damage from Vaal Righteous Fire do not interfere with or stop Righteous Fire, both skills may be used simultaneously.
Vaal Righteous Fire | Item acquisition | Vaal Righteous Fire has restrictions on where or how it can drop. Vaal Righteous Fire can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas.

Acquisition Drop restricted Drop level: 10 Vaal Summon Skeletons can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas ; for Vaal Summon Skeletons gems that grant "of Archers" and "of Mages" skills, the gems are acquired from Eternal Labyrinth of Potential
Vaal Summon Skeletons | Description | Vaal Summon Skeletons is a vaal spell that summons an army of skeletons, led by a skeleton general.
Vaal Summon Skeletons | Skill functions and interactions | One of several general variants will be randomly summoned on cast.
Vaal Summon Skeletons | Skill functions and interactions | This skill works with the passive skills that increase the maximum number of skeletons. But like Summon Skeletons it does not gain an increase in the amount spawned at each use. If one were to cast the ability while it is still in effect its behaviour is similar to Summon Skeletons; first it spawns new skeletons up to the cap, then it start replacing the oldest one. When replacing, no consideration is taken to what kind of skeleton is summoned or replaced. Hence it's possible to have two generals at a (short) time. At gem level 20 with all passives and no unique items the chance is 6/(36+6).
Vaal Summon Skeletons | Skill functions and interactions | As with the normal counterpart, Summon Skeletons, the summoned skeletons do not follow you and cannot be summoned with Convocation. While Alberon's Warpath will make Skeleton Warriors summoned by non-Vaal Summon Skeletons permanent and follow you, this does not apply to skeletons summoned by Vaal Summon Skeletons.
Vaal Summon Skeletons | Skill functions and interactions | Duration : Vaal Summon Skeletons is the only Vaal Skill with a duration component that does not have the stat Modifiers to Skill Effect Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention. Accordingly, soul gain prevention time cannot be indirectly modified through skill effect duration.
Vaal Summon Skeletons | Item acquisition | Vaal Summon Skeletons has restrictions on where or how it can drop. Vaal Summon Skeletons can drop from the Vaal Vessels found in Vaal side areas ; for Vaal Summon Skeletons gems that grant "of Archers" and "of Mages" skills, the gems are acquired from Eternal Labyrinth of Potential

Viper Strike | Description | Viper Strike is an melee strike attack skill usable with claws , daggers , and swords. Its hits convert physical damage to chaos damage and have a chance to poison. It uses both weapons to deal damage while dual wielding.

Viper Strike | Skill functions and interactions | As a strike skill without an area of effect, Viper Strike's ability to handle packs of enemies is greatly improved by Melee Splash Support or Tribal Fury , as well as Ancestral Call Support or similar modifiers available from e.g. Attack Mastery , Hunter-influenced gloves, or the Searing Exarch implicit on gloves.

Viper Strike of the Mamba | Description | Viper Strike of the Mamba is a melee strike attack skill usable with claws , daggers , and swords. Its hits convert physical damage to chaos damage and have a chance to poison. It hits with both weapons while dual wielding.
Viper Strike of the Mamba | Description | It is a transfigured version of Viper Strike.
Viper Strike of the Mamba | Changes from default version | Unlike the original skill, this transfigured version deals more damage with poison, but it can't poison a target that's already poisoned, and cannot inflict multiple poisons in the same hit. The poison from this skill has less duration than Viper Strike, matching the default base poison duration. Gem quality grants more damage with poison instead.
Viper Strike of the Mamba | Strategy | To maximize the damage from Viper Strike of the Mamba, it's important to have your attack speed be as close to the poison duration as possible without getting your attacks per second faster than the poison duration.
Viper Strike of the Mamba | Strategy | Sadism Support synergizes the best with this skill, allowing you to maintain a high attack speed while avoiding the penalty.
Viper Strike of the Mamba | Strategy | Another way to play around this skill is to increase the duration of poison through Unbound Ailments Support and use exert effects such as Ambush , avoiding the need to keep attacking in order to maintain uptime.
Viper Strike of the Mamba | Strategy | Master Toxicist from Pathfinder has strong synergy with this skill. It inflicts poison with the DPS of the highest poison on the killed enemy, with a base 2 second duration that is unaffected by modifiers specific for Viper Strike. Its duration can be scaled by global poison modifiers, but is not negatively affected by deal Damage #% faster modifiers. Because this effect is not limited to poisoning non-poisoned enemies, it can stack poisons on a single enemy by killing multiple poisoned enemies nearby it, potentially through the use of Vaal Breach. Supports or effects such as Melee Splash Support and Ancestral Call Support are useful to poison multiple enemies simultaneously.
Viper Strike of the Mamba | Strategy | Cannot inflict Poison on Poisoned Enemies : If Hunted Traitors or Legion monsters are added to a map with modifier that causes monsters to poison, they will poison each other, severely limiting your ability to apply poisons using this skill.
Viper Strike of the Mamba | Item acquisition | Viper Strike of the Mamba has restrictions on where or how it can drop. This item is a transfigured gem. It can be obtained through the use of the Divine Font in the Lord's Labyrinth.
Viper Strike of the Mamba | Recipes | Viper Strike of the Mamba can be created from the following recipes:

Viper Strike of the Mamba | Threshold jewels | Note that the jewels may be drop disabled and can only be found in permanent leagues as legacy items.

Void Sphere | Description | Void Sphere is a spell which creates a sphere that releases pulses that deals physical and converted chaos damage in an area around it for a duration. It also hinders nearby enemies, slowing their movement speed. Enemies killed within the sphere are sucked in, consuming their corpses.
Void Sphere | Skill functions and interactions | Void Sphere's pulling effect is not considered (reverse) knockback [1].
Void Sphere | Skill functions and interactions | There is no pulse at 0 sec, therefore there is a delay before it starts dealing damage.

Volatility Support | Description | Volatility Support is a support gem that increases the damage variance of attack skills. It also grants increased damage in general.
Volatility Support | Skill functions and interactions | Supported Skills deal #% more Maximum Attack Damage and Supported Skills deal #% less Minimum Attack Damage , despite containing the terminology "attack damage", actually apply to the base and added damage of the skill [1] , not the damage range after hit damage multipliers. Accordingly, this modifier affects both hit damage and damage over time from damaging ailments.
Volatility Support | Skill functions and interactions | Similar stats (e.g. Ryslatha's Coil ) apply multiplicatively. Level 20 Volatility combined with a 20% attack quality Ryslatha's Coil with 40/30 damage rolls results in a 2.34x multiplier to maximum flat physical damage, and 0.2x multiplier to minimum physical damage.
Volatility Support | Skill functions and interactions | This support synergizes with attacks or weapons with high base damage variance:
Volatility Support | Skill functions and interactions | In addition to increasing the average damage of high-variance rolls, high hit damage may also be favorable for mechanics such as non-damaging ailments , stun , or Cruelty Support.
Volatility Support | Skill functions and interactions | High variance also synergizes with the Lucky mechanic (e.g. Dance with Death , Voice of the Storm ). Note that only hits can be lucky; ailments applied by lucky hits are not affected and are derived from the initial base damage.
Volatility Support | Item acquisition | Volatility Support can drop anywhere.
Volatility Support | Recipes | Volatility Support can be created from the following recipes:
Volatility Support | Quest reward | This item is given as a quest reward for the following quests:
Volatility Support | Vendor reward | This item can be bought at the listed NPC vendors , after completing the following quests:

Volcanic Fissure | Description | Volcanic Fissure is a melee slam attack skill. Upon use, the user slams the ground, creating a fissure that deals damage while travelling, and erupts at its target, releasing a burst of molten projectiles.
Volcanic Fissure | Skill functions and interactions | Returning projectiles : Effects that cause projectiles to return will cause the projectiles from Volcanic Fissure to bounce again and land on the same spot where they first landed. Because the projectiles are spawned by the fissure, but the fissure despawns itself after creating the projectiles, they do not have a source to return to and default to landing on its current location. This effectively doubles the damage of Volcanic Fissure projectiles.

Voltaxic Burst | Description | Voltaxic Burst is a spell skill gem which, after casting, waits for a short duration before releasing a burst of lightning and chaos spell damage in an area around you, exploding enemies killed by it.
Voltaxic Burst | Skill functions and interactions | Area of Effect : Increased AoE will increase both the area of the burst and the area of the secondary explosions.
Voltaxic Burst | Skill functions and interactions | Duration : Increases and reductions to duration will affect the time between the cast and the burst. Reducing the duration will allow you to deal damage sooner, while increasing the duration might allow you to make better use of 1% more Damage with Hits and Ailments for each Cast of this Spell currently waiting.
Voltaxic Burst | Skill functions and interactions | The modifier: 1% more Damage with Hits and Ailments for each Cast of this Spell currently waiting , is taken into account when an individual spell cast deals damage, not when said spell was initially cast [1]. i.e. If the player were to have 30 casts in waiting, the first spell to deal damage will have a 30% more multiplier. If the player was to stop casting, the final cast of that initial 30 would only have 1% more damage. Voltaxic Bursts cast using different Skill Gems use the same counter for the aforementioned modifier, but have distinct durations based upon the gems supporting it.
Voltaxic Burst | Skill functions and interactions | Conversion : Voltaxic Rift or Original Sin can be equipped to fully convert the damage dealt to chaos, allowing better scaling with penetration/resistances or poison through withered , and in the case of Voltaxic Rift, additionally allows the Chaos damage to contribute to shock.
Voltaxic Burst | Skill functions and interactions | Explosion : The corpse explosion deals secondary damage in an area and cannot be reflected.
Voltaxic Burst | Skill functions and interactions | Astral Projector : Does work with Voltaxic Burst. [3] The damage when the duration expires occurs where you targeted the spell rather than around you. [4]
Voltaxic Burst | Item acquisition | Voltaxic Burst can drop anywhere.
Voltaxic Burst | Recipes | Voltaxic Burst can be created from the following recipes:
Voltaxic Burst | Quest reward | This item is given as a quest reward for the following quests:
Voltaxic Burst | Vendor reward | This item can be bought at the listed NPC vendors , after completing the following quests:

Vortex | Description | Vortex is a cold spell that deals damage in an area around the character and leaves a ground effect that both chills ( chilled ground ) and deals cold damage over time. [1]
Vortex | Skill functions and interactions | Chilling Area : Enemies inside a chilling area become chilled. This chilling area is affected by the player and skill's modifiers to the effect of cold/non-damaging ailments, but its chills are not considered inflicted by the player. It cannot apply chilled by you stats, cannot make the player count as having chilled recently, and can chill regardless of stats that prevent the application of chill by the player, such as Elemental Focus Support or Secrets of Suffering.

Wall of Force | Infobox | Spell , Duration Level: (1-20) Cost: (9-33) Mana Cooldown Time: 9.00 sec Can Store 1 Use(s) Cast Time: 0.50 sec. Requires Level 16. Creates a wall of force which allies and enemies can pass through, but allied projectiles which can collide with enemies will also collide with this wall, and can chain from it to other targets. Projectiles can only collide with a single Wall of Force, and no more than once. Base duration is (5.10-7.00) seconds Wall will be (4.5-6) meters long Projectiles cannot Split, Pierce, or Fork when colliding with the wall Projectiles can Chain an additional time when colliding with the wall Projectiles can only chain to targets on the same side of the wall Projectiles which have collided with the wall deal (30-20)% less Damage Wall is destroyed after (11-17) Projectile collisions Additional Effects From 1-20% Quality: (1-20)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate. Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket. Acquisition Drop level: 16

War Banner | Infobox | AoE , Spell , Duration , Aura , Physical Level: (1-20) Cost: (13-19) Mana Cooldown Time: 1.00 sec Can Store 1 Use(s) Cast Time: Instant. Requires Level 4. You must gain Valour from melee combat to use this skill, which will consume all Valour to place a banner with an aura. The aura will be larger and more powerful the more Valour was consumed. The banner lasts for a duration, but will end early if you leave the aura, or use the skill again while it's active. Base duration is 10.00 seconds Base radius is 2.4 metres While you have no placed Banner, you can gain Valour (5-10)% more Area of Effect per Valour consumed (5-10)% more Aura effect per Valour consumed Banner grants 8% increased Accuracy Rating to You and Allies Banner grants 4% more Physical Damage with Melee Skills to You and Allies Additional Effects From 1-20% Quality: Base duration is (0.1-2) seconds. Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket. Acquisition Drop level: 5
War Banner | Description | War Banner is a banner aura skill. After gaining Valour from melee combat, it can be activated, consuming all Valour and placing a banner that buffs the user and allies within an area with increased accuracy and more physical damage with melee skills. The effect of the aura is multiplied based on the amount of Valour consumed.
War Banner | Mechanics | #% more Physical Damage with Melee Skills grants all skills with the melee gem tag a general % more Physical Damage modifier. This applies to physical hit damage, hit damage converted from physical into another type, and physical damage over time such as Bleeding. (Though not Corrupting Fever applied by melee hits.)

Wave of Conviction of Trarthus | Description | Wave of Conviction of Trarthus is a physical / fire spell which creates a ring of energy that expands outwards from the player over a duration, then returns, dealing damage both ways. Only one Wave of Conviction can be active at a time.
Wave of Conviction of Trarthus | Description | It is a Trarthan version of Wave of Conviction.
Wave of Conviction of Trarthus | Changes from default version | Unlike the original skill, this Trarthan version has lower base damage and damage effectiveness, duration, and does not inflict exposure on hit. It converts 50% of physical damage to fire damage instead of 25% fire and 25% lightning. The wave expands in a circular nova around the user then contracts when half of its duration expires [1] , dealing damage both ways.
Wave of Conviction of Trarthus | Skill functions and interactions | Wave count limit: Casting Wave of Conviction of Trarthus while there is another Wave active will cause the first Wave to disappear shortly after. This can result in the skill failing to hit an enemy if it is overwritten early. The wave limit is shared with your proxies and will overwrite each other.
Wave of Conviction of Trarthus | Skill functions and interactions | Both area of effect and skill duration affect the maximum distance the wave can travel, but area of effect widens the ring's width while duration increases the time it takes for the wave to fully surge outwards then return.
Wave of Conviction of Trarthus | Item acquisition | Wave of Conviction of Trarthus has restrictions on where or how it can drop.
Wave of Conviction of Trarthus | Item acquisition | Can be obtained from reward chests that contain gems in Heist.

Wild Strike | Infobox | Attack , Melee , Strike , Lightning , Cold , Fire , Projectile , AoE , Chaining , Prismatic Level: (1-20) Cost: (7-10) Mana Attack Damage: (219-403)% of base Effectiveness of Added Damage: (219-403)% Projectile Speed: 1800. Then, depending on the element chosen, it releases a fiery explosion, an arcing bolt of lightning, or an icy wave. It will avoid choosing the same element twice in a row. Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket. Acquisition Drop level: 28
Wild Strike | Description | Wild Strike is a melee attack skill that converts all of the damage to a random element when an enemy is struck. Then, depending on the element chosen, it releases an explosion, an arcing bolt of lightning, or an icy wave.
Wild Strike | Skill functions and interactions | An attack with Wild Strike consists of two parts: an initial melee hit that functions similarly to a default melee attack and one of the following effects being chosen at random with equal chance. [1] If an enemy is hit with the melee part, they cannot be hit by any version of the secondary effect. [2] The cold projectile can hit the target hit by the melee part if the projectile returns. [3]
Wild Strike | Skill functions and interactions | Modifiers that require a specific keyword only apply to the appropriate portions of the attack. [1] For example, supporting Wild Strike with Melee Physical Damage Support will increase the melee hit's physical and converted damage, but will not increase the damage of the secondary elemental effect. That said, passive points that grant Increased damage with one-handed melee weapons for example will in fact affect the triggered attacks as well if one is using a one-handed weapon, since it is still an attack that is dealt with a melee weapon (though the damage you're dealing is not actually melee damage). Similarly, supporting Wild Strike with Lesser Multiple Projectiles Support will cause the Icy Wave to fire additional projectiles and deal less damage, but will not affect any other portions of the attack.
Wild Strike | Skill functions and interactions | Prismatic: Wild Strike will never pick the same element twice in a row.
Wild Strike | Skill functions and interactions | Damage conversion : An attack with Wild Strike converts 100% of physical damage to a random element; this conversion applies to all parts of the attack. Like all converted damage, the elemental portion of Wild Strike's damage will be modified by both elemental and physical damage increases.
Wild Strike | Skill functions and interactions | Tooltip damage: The damage dealt and DPS values shown on this ability's tooltip only indicates the statistics of the initial hit and does not include the random elemental conversion.
Wild Strike | Skill functions and interactions | Dual wielding : Wild Strike with dual wielding will always alternate between both weapons.
Wild Strike | Skill functions and interactions | Multistrike Support : Repeats of Wild Strike will be of the same element as the original attack. Wild Strike will avoid choosing the same element for the next use of the skill.
Wild Strike | Item acquisition | Wild Strike can drop anywhere.
Wild Strike | Recipes | Wild Strike can be created from the following recipes:
Wild Strike | Usage in recipes | Wild Strike is used in the following recipes:
Wild Strike | Quest reward | This item is given as a quest reward for the following quests:
Wild Strike | Vendor reward | This item can be bought at the listed NPC vendors , after completing the following quests:
Wild Strike | Threshold jewels | The following threshold jewels augment Wild Strike:
Wild Strike | Threshold jewels | Note that the jewels may be drop disabled and can only be found in permanent leagues as legacy items.
Wild Strike | Related helmet enchantments | The following helmet enchantments affect Wild Strike.
Wild Strike | Related helmet enchantments | Note that helmet enchantments are no longer obtainable since version 3.23.0 and can only be obtained in permanent leagues as already enchanted items from before this patch.

Requires Level 28. Your melee weapon strikes enemies, converting physical damage to a random element. Then, depending on the element chosen, it releases a fiery explosion, an arcing bolt of lightning, or an icy wave. It will avoid choosing the same element twice in a row. Projectiles Pierce all Targets Beams Chain (4-7) Times Fires 3 Projectiles (0-19)% increased Area of Effect 100% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire, Cold or Lightning Damage Hits treat Enemy Monster Elemental Resistance values as inverted Additional Effects From 1-20% Quality: (1-20)% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite. Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket. Acquisition Drop restricted Drop level: 28 This item is a transfigured gem. Wild Strike of Extremes | Description | Wild Strike of Extremes is a melee attack skill that converts all of the damage to a random element when an enemy is struck. Then, depending on the element chosen, it releases an explosion, an arcing bolt of lightning, or an icy wave.
Wild Strike of Extremes | Description | It is a transfigured version of Wild Strike.
Wild Strike of Extremes | Changes from default version | Unlike the original skill, this transfigured version has a life and energy shield cost , as well as having a higher mana cost , slightly lower damage effectiveness, and treats enemy resistances as being inverted for hits.
Wild Strike of Extremes | Skill functions and interactions | An attack with Wild Strike consists of two parts: an initial melee hit that functions similarly to a default melee attack and one of the following effects being chosen at random with equal chance. [1] If an enemy is hit with the melee part, they cannot be hit by any version of the secondary effect. [2] The cold projectile can hit the target hit by the melee part if the projectile returns. [3]
Wild Strike of Extremes | Skill functions and interactions | Modifiers that require a specific keyword only apply to the appropriate portions of the attack. [1] For example, supporting Wild Strike with Melee Physical Damage Support will increase the melee hit's physical and converted damage, but will not increase the damage of the secondary elemental effect. That said, passive points that grant Increased damage with one-handed melee weapons for example will in fact affect the triggered attacks as well if one is using a one-handed weapon, since it is still an attack that is dealt with a melee weapon (though the damage you're dealing is not actually melee damage). Similarly, supporting Wild Strike with Lesser Multiple Projectiles Support will cause the Icy Wave to fire additional projectiles and deal less damage, but will not affect any other portions of the attack.
Wild Strike of Extremes | Skill functions and interactions | Prismatic: Wild Strike will never pick the same element twice in a row, unless it has only one element to choose from. Combat Focus jewels prevent specific element effects from being chosen.
Wild Strike of Extremes | Skill functions and interactions | Damage conversion : An attack with Wild Strike converts 100% of physical damage to a random element; this conversion applies to all parts of the attack. Like all converted damage, the elemental portion of Wild Strike's damage will be modified by both elemental and physical damage increases.
Wild Strike of Extremes | Skill functions and interactions | Tooltip damage: The damage dealt and DPS values shown on this ability's tooltip only indicates the statistics of the initial hit and does not include the random elemental conversion.
Wild Strike of Extremes | Skill functions and interactions | Dual wielding : Wild Strike with dual wielding will always alternate between both weapons.
Wild Strike of Extremes | Skill functions and interactions | Multistrike Support : Repeats of Wild Strike will be of the same element as the original attack. Wild Strike will avoid choosing the same element for the next use of the skill.
Wild Strike of Extremes | Skill functions and interactions | Hits Treat Enemy Monster Elemental Resistance values as inverted : Inverts positive and negative elemental resistance values after factoring curses and exposure when calculating damage. Penetration applies to the inverted value.
Wild Strike of Extremes | Item acquisition | Wild Strike of Extremes has restrictions on where or how it can drop. This item is a transfigured gem. It can be obtained through the use of the Divine Font in the Lord's Labyrinth.

Supported Attacks Trigger Windburst on Hit, no more than once every 10 metres moved Projectiles Pierce all Targets Base duration is 4.00 seconds Fires 3 Projectiles 40% more Area Damage Base radius is 1.5 metres This Skill is Triggered by Supported Attack Skills Additional Effects From 1-20% Quality: Supported Skills deal (0.5-10)% increased Projectile Damage. Windburst Support | Description | Windburst Support is a support gem that causes supported attack skills to trigger Windburst on hit, which fires piercing projectiles that move randomly and explode at the end of their duration, dealing area attack damage. Windburst does not have a cooldown ; instead, it can only be triggered once each time the character moves at least 10 metres.
Windburst Support | Description | Note: Due to technical limitations, this page's infobox displays gem stats belonging to both Windburst Support and Windburst.
Windburst Support | Skill functions and interactions | Despite being tagged "Bow", Windburst can support any attack skill. Even while wielding a bow, Windburst does not fire arrows , and is unaffected by Bow Attacks fire # additional Arrows (from e.g. Master Fletcher , bows, or quivers). [1]
Windburst Support | Skill functions and interactions | By default, Windburst projectiles pierce all targets. If pierce is disabled, such as through Kineticism , and the projectile is destroyed before its full duration due to hitting a target, the explosion will not occur. [ confirmation needed ] Windburst projectiles can split.
Windburst Support | Skill functions and interactions | Windburst projectiles move in random directions in a zig-zag motion. Unlike Spark which can hit enemies after a fixed interval, Windburst projeciles appear to be only able to hit the same enemy once until they bounce off a wall or obstacle. [2]

Requires Level 28. Channel to conjure an orb above you, which pelts nearby enemies with projectiles that impact the ground and explode. Channelling for longer builds up stages on the skill. When you stop channelling, the stages decay over a duration. Deals (39-360) to (49-450) Cold Damage Base duration is 1.60 seconds Increases and Reductions to Cast Speed also apply to Projectile Frequency Fires projectiles every 1.2 seconds 30% increased Duration per Stage 80% more Projectile Frequency while Channelling 20% increased Projectile Frequency per Stage Maximum 8 Stages Additional Effects From 1-20% Quality: +(0.1-2) Maximum Stages. Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket. Acquisition Drop level: 28
Winter Orb | Description | Winter Orb is a channelling spell skill. Channelling the skill charges up an orb, which fires icy projectiles that deal cold damage in an area of effect where they land.
Winter Orb | Skill functions and interactions | Projectiles from Winter Orb don't directly collide with enemies, and accordingly cannot split , pierce , fork , chain , or return. Its projectiles benefit from both area damage and projectile damage modifiers.
Winter Orb | Skill functions and interactions | Firing projectiles in a nova with Sire of Shards causes multiple projects to launch spread out as expected but land not exactly the same distance away from the caster.
Winter Orb | Projectile Rate | Base projectile rate at stage 1 without any increased cast speed is.833 per second.
Winter Orb | Projectile Rate | The first stage does not gain projectile frequency. Therefore 8 stages gives (7 X 20) = 140% increased projectile frequency. The plus 2 maximum stages at 20% quality adds 40% projectile frequency.
Winter Orb | Projectile Rate | All cast speed modifiers are additive with the increased projectile frequency. Therefore a 10 stage winter orb with 100% cast speed has (180 + 100) = 280% total increase projectile frequency.
Winter Orb | Projectile Rate | 80% more projectile frequency will multiply your projectile fire rate by 1.8 while channelling.
Winter Orb | Projectile Rate | Example of projectile fire rate while channelling at 10 stages and 100% increased cast speed:
Winter Orb | Area of Effect | Each projectile's impact explosions can hit the same target if the area of effect is scaled enough for them to overlap.
Winter Orb | Area of Effect | Winter Orb with multiple projectiles will shoot them in a rough line, not a cluster. Adding more projectiles makes this line longer, thus requiring more area of effect to increase overlaps.
Winter Orb | Area of Effect | The Area of Effect breakpoint for 5 projectiles is between 2.6 and 2.8 meters depending on the monster's size and how close they are to the player.
Winter Orb | Item acquisition | Winter Orb can drop anywhere.

Withering Step | Infobox | Travel , AoE , Chaos , Movement , Blink , Spell , Duration Level: (1-20) Cost: (8-23) Mana Cooldown Time: 3.00 sec Can Store 1 Use(s) Cast Time: Instant. Requires Level 10. Grants Elusive and a buff that grants Phasing. While you have this buff, monsters that enter an area around you will be Withered. Using a skill or losing the Elusive buff ends this skill's effects. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills. Cannot be used while already Elusive. Withered lasts 3 seconds +(0-0.6) metres to radius Cannot be Cast or Triggered while Elusive Grants Elusive This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect (0-38)% increased Effect of Elusive from this Skill Buff grants Phasing Inflicts (4-6) Withered Debuffs the first time each Enemy enters the Area Additional Effects From 1-20% Quality: Inflicts +(0.1-2) Withered Debuffs the first time each Enemy enters the Area. Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket. Acquisition Drop level: 10
Withering Step | Description | Withering Step is a movement skill that applies the Elusive and Phasing buffs on use. Enemies that get near you while you have Elusive receive multiple stacks of the Withered debuff for a duration, causing them to take increased chaos damage. Using any skill ends Withering Step's effects and removes all buffs, except the Withered debuff on enemies.

Withering Touch Support | Infobox | Chaos , Physical , Attack , Support , Duration Icon: w Level: (1-20) Cost & Reservation Multiplier: 130%. Requires Level 38. Supports attack skills. Supported Skills have 25% chance to inflict Withered on Hit Withered lasts 2 seconds Supported Skills gain (10-29)% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage Additional Effects From 1-20% Quality: Supported Skills deal (0.5-10)% increased Chaos Damage. This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket. Acquisition Drop level: 38
Withering Touch Support | Description | Withering Touch Support is a support gem that gives the supported skill a chance to apply a stack of the Withered debuff on hit , increasing the chaos damage they take per stack. It also grants added chaos damage based on physical damage.
Withering Touch Support | Skill functions and interactions | Supported Skills have 25% chance to inflict Withered on Hit.

Wrath | Infobox | Aura , Spell , AoE , Lightning Level: (1-20) Reservation: 50% Mana Cooldown Time: 1.20 sec Can Store 1 Use(s) Cast Time: Instant AoE Radius: 36. Requires Level 24. Casts an aura that adds lightning damage to the attacks of you and your allies, and makes your spells deal more lightning damage. +(0-1.9) metres to radius You and nearby allies deal (2-16) to (37-248) additional Lightning Damage with Attacks You and nearby allies deal (15-21)% more Spell Lightning Damage Additional Effects From 1-20% Quality: (2-40)% increased Area of Effect. Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket. Acquisition Drop level: 24
Wrath | Description | Wrath casts an aura that grants additional lightning damage to the attacks of the caster and their allies and makes their spells deal more lightning damage.
Wrath | Skill functions and interactions | The effect of this skill is considered a buff , and will be affected by modifiers that affect buffs.
Wrath | Skill functions and interactions | Multiple Wrath auras from different allies do not stack. Only damage from highest-level aura affecting a creature will be added.
Wrath | Skill functions and interactions | For more information about auras in general, see aura.

Wrath | Monster version | The monster version of this aura, Lightning Damage Aura , does not add flat lighting damage, but Gain #% of Physical Damage as Extra Lightning Damage.
Wrath | Monster version | Most of them have magnitude of 25%, and 150% variant is used by Humming Totem (mod id: MonsterAuraUniqueMapLightningDamage; The Putrid Cloister ).
Wrath | Monster version | Amarissa, Daughter of Merveil of Act 1 uses the variant "MonsterAmarissaAuraAddedLightningDamage"
Zealotry | Infobox | Aura , Critical , Spell , AoE Level: (1-20) Reservation: 50% Mana Cooldown Time: 1.20 sec Can Store 1 Use(s) Cast Time: Instant. Requires Level 24. Casts an aura that grants bonuses to damage and critical strike chance of spells to you and your allies, and gives a chance to create Consecrated Ground against stronger enemies. +(0-1.9) metres to radius You and nearby Non-Minion Allies have a 10% chance to create Consecrated Ground on Hitting a Rare or Unique Enemy, lasting 8 seconds You and nearby allies have (20-39)% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance You and nearby allies deal (10-15)% more Spell Damage Additional Effects From 1-20% Quality: (2-40)% increased Area of Effect. Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket. Acquisition Drop level: 24
Zealotry | Description | Zealotry is an aura skill gem that grants bonuses to damage and critical strike chance of spells to you and your allies , and gives a chance to create Consecrated Ground against stronger enemies.
Zealotry | Skill functions and interactions | You and nearby Non-Minion Allies have a 10% chance to create Consecrated Ground on Hitting a Rare or Unique Enemy : this stat applies to skills used by proxies , but only when the proxy has died, likely due to a bug. [1] This effectively disables it for totems , as well as trap and mine skills that hit faster than the trap or mine's death animation.
